generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mom and a professional, I've always believed in keeping our country safe without sacrificing our freedoms. That's why I support strategic autonomy—it's about smart, practical steps to ensure our security while maintaining our way of life. Did you know that countries with strong autonomy frameworks have seen a 30% reduction in security threats? It's not about isolation; it's about being smart and self-reliant. Let's keep our families safe and our values intact. #SmartSecurity #FamilyFirst
